evidence.shareholders: Shareholders Resolution No. Pemegang Saham Perusahaan No. 6 dari 6 of Aulia Taufani, S.H., Notary in Jakarta, dated Notaris Aulia Taufani, S.H., Notaris di Jakarta September 1, 2021 that change the Company’s tanggal 1 September 2021 yang mengubah status from Private Company to Public status Perusahaan dari Perusahaan Tertutup Company and therefore change the Company’s menjadi Perusahaan Terbuka dan karenanya name from PT Sumber Tani Agung Resources mengubah nama Perusahaan dari sebelumnya to become PT Sumber Tani Agung Resources PT Sumber Tani Agung Resources menjadi Tbk. This amendment was approved by the PT Sumber Tani Agung Resources Tbk. Minister of Law and Human Rights of the Perubahan ini telah disetujui oleh Menteri Republic of Indonesia in Letter No. AHU- Hukum dan Hak Asasi Manusia dalam Surat 0047321.AH.01.02.Tahun 2021 dated Keputusan No. AHU-0047321.AH.01.02.Tahun September 2, 2021. 2021 tanggal 2 September 2021. Perusahaan dan entitas anak bergerak The Company and its subsidiaries are engaged dibidang usaha manajemen dan budidaya in the management and cultivation of oil palm perkebunan kelapa sawit dan pabrik plantations and crude palm oil processing mills pengolahan minyak sawit mentah dan produk and its other derivative products and the selling hasil turunannya dan penjualan produk terkait. of the related end products. Their business Bisnisnya beroperasi di Sumatera Utara, operations are located in North Sumatera, Sumatera Selatan, Kalimantan Barat, South Sumatera, West Kalimantan, Central Kalimantan Tengah dan Singapura. Disamping Kalimantan and Singapore. In addition to the mengelola perkebunannya sendiri, Perusahaan development of their plantations, the Company dan entitas anak tertentu juga mengembangkan and certain subsidiaries have been developing dan membina perkebunan plasma dalam and managing plasma plantations cooperation bekerjasama dengan petani plasma. with plasma farmers. Perusahaan mulai mengoperasikan pabrik The Company has operated its palm oil pengolahan kelapa sawit pada bulan Mei 2010. processing factory since May 2010. The Kantor pusat Perusahan berlokasi di Medan, Company’s head office is located in Medan, Sumatera Utara. North Sumatera. 9 The original consolidated financial statements included herein are in the Indonesian language.
